records.title: Love on the Brain
records.reason: This track has a dramatic chorus that perfectly fits the current need. The lyrics are heartfelt and evocative, creating a strong emotional connection for the listener.

records.title: All of Me
records.reason: This track has a soft electronic beat and a melodic chorus that perfectly fits the current need. The lyrics are simple yet evocative, allowing the listener to feel the emotions without getting distracted by the lyrics.

records.title: Love Story
records.reason: This song has a clear, emotional narrative that can be both uplifting and deeply moving, making it perfect for a late-night emotional listening session.

records.title: Everything In Its Right Place
records.reason: This track has a dreamy, melodic quality that can be both calming and deeply moving, making it ideal for a late-night emotional listening session.

records.title: River Flows in You
records.reason: This song features a heartfelt vocal performance, a lyrical story about love and loss, and a dramatic chorus that creates a clear emotional release, making it perfect for late-night emotional listening.

records.title: Someone Like You
records.reason: Adele's emotive vocal performance, along with the lyrics that tell a moving story of heartbreak, make this song ideal for late-night emotional listening. The dramatic chorus adds to the overall emotional impact.

records.title: All of Me
records.reason: John Legend's powerful vocal performance, along with the lyrics that convey a deep emotional story, make this song a great choice for late-night emotional listening. The song's dramatic chorus adds to the overall emotional impact.

records.title: Someone You Loved
records.reason: Bon Iver's introspective vocal performance, along with the lyrical story about love and heartbreak, make this song perfect for late-night emotional listening. The song's dramatic chorus creates a clear emotional release, making it ideal for this need.

records.title: Don't Stop Me Now
records.reason: A classic rock track with a strong energy and rhythmic guitar riffs that can ignite the dance floor.

records.title: One More Time
records.reason: A retro disco hit with a catchy beat and memorable lyrics, perfect for a 2am rave atmosphere.

records.title: Eyes of the Moon
records.reason: This track features a slow, atmospheric sound that allows for a focused listening experience without any vocals or lyrics.

records.title: Space Oddity
records.reason:
This track has a haunting, atmospheric quality that doesn't require much attention. The instrumental arrangement is soothing and allows for a focused listening experience.
